column2: 主要屋苑是指由同一發展商（無論是公營機構或私營機構）在相鄰地區同期或分多期發展並於2021年居住人數不少於3 000人或住戶數目不少於1 000個的住宅樓宇組群。
** - 由於抽樣誤差大，有關統計數字不予公布。
(1) - 數字包括報稱有多於一個種族的人士。
(2) - 數字不包括失去語言能力的人士。
(3) - 同區就讀的人士包括（a）在香港島或九龍居住並在同一區議會分區內上課的人士，（b）在新市鎮居住並在同一新市鎮上課的人士，及（c）在新界其他地方居住並在同一區議會分區非新市鎮地區內上課的人士。
(4) - 2021年人口普查所採用非從事經濟活動人口的經濟活動身分分類（即「料理家務者」、「學生」、「退休人士」、「無酬照顧者」及「其他」），跟2011年人口普查及2016年中期人口統計所採用的分類（即「料理家務者」、「學生」、「退休人士」及「其他」）稍有分別，因此2021年統計數字與2011年及／或2016年統計數字作比較時須加以留意。
(5) - 無酬照顧者指須無酬照顧親人或其他人士（包括長期病患、殘疾或年長／年幼的人士）的人。
(6) - 同區工作的人士包括（a）在香港島或九龍居住並在同一區議會分區內工作的人士，（b）在新市鎮居住並在同一新市鎮工作的人士，及（c）在新界其他地方居住並在同一區議會分區非新市鎮地區內工作的人士。於家中工作的人士並不包括在內。
(7) - 2021 年人口普查採用了新的職業分類方法，此職業分類方法更為貼近「國際標準職業分類法2008 年版」。
(8) - 數字是按「香港標準行業分類2.0 版」為藍本的行業分類而編製。
(9) - 「其他」包括「農業、林業及漁業」、「採礦及採石」、「電力及燃氣供應」、「自來水供應；污水處理、廢棄物管理及污染防治活動」等行業，及報稱的行業不能辨別或描述不足。
(10) - 數字包括（一）由一對已婚夫婦而並無其他親屬所組成的住戶；（二）由一對夫婦及其未婚子女而並無其他親屬所組成的住戶；及（三）由父／母一方及其未婚子女而並無其他親屬所組成的住戶。這類住戶可包括或不包括其他無親屬關係的同住人士，例如家庭傭工。
(11) - 數字包括（一）由一對夫婦及其至少一個父或母親（包括夫婦雙方的父母親）而並無其他親屬所組成的住戶；（二）由一對夫婦、至少一個父或母親（包括夫婦雙方的父母親）及其未婚子女而並無其他親屬所組成的住戶；及（三）由一羣有親屬關係人士所組成但未能歸入其他類別的住戶。這類住戶可包括或不包括其他無親屬關係的同住人士，例如家庭傭工。
(12) - 數字包括只有一個人的住戶及由一羣無親屬關係人士所組成的住戶。
(13) - 從事經濟活動的家庭住戶是指家庭住戶內除外籍家庭傭工外至少有一名其他成員從事經濟活動。
(14) - 數字不包括居於非屋宇單位或船艇的家庭住戶。與其他住戶共同佔用的樓面面積不包括在內。

A major housing estate refers to a group of residential buildings developed by the same developer (either in the public sector or in the private sector) in one or more phases in a neighbourhood and with at least 3 000 residents or 1 000 domestic households in 2021.
** - Statistics are not released due to large sampling error.
(1) - Figures include persons who reported more than one ethnicity.

(3) - Persons who study in the same district include: (a) those who live on Hong Kong Island or in Kowloon and study in the same District Council district; (b) those who live in a new town and study in the same new town; and (c) those who live in other areas in the New Territories and study in areas other than new town areas of the same District Council district.

(4) - The classification of economic activity status for economically inactive population adopted in the 2021 Population Census (i.e. “Home-makers”, “Students”, “Retired persons”, “Unpaid carers” and “Others”) slightly differs from that adopted in the 2011 Population Census and 2016 Population By-census (i.e. “Home-makers”, “Students”, “Retired persons” and “Others”). Therefore, caution should be taken when comparing figures for 2021 with those for 2011 and/or 2016.
(5) - Unpaid carers refer to persons who are engaged in unpaid care to family members or other persons (including persons with chronic diseases/disability and old/young persons).

(6) - Persons who work in the same district include: (a) those who live on Hong Kong Island or in Kowloon and work in the same District Council district; (b) those who live in a new town and work in the same new town; and (c) those who live in other areas in the New Territories and work in areas other than new town areas of the same District Council district. Persons who work at home are excluded.
(7) - A new occupation classification scheme which follows “International Standard Classification Occupations 2008 (ISCO-08)” more closely was adopted in the 2021 Population Census.
(8) - Figures are compiled based on the industry classification modelled on the Hong Kong Standard Industrial Classification Version 2.0.

(9) - "Others" include "Agriculture, forestry and fishing"; "Mining and quarrying"; "Electricity and gas supply"; "Water supply; sewerage, waste management and remediation activities" and industrial activities unidentifiable or inadequately described.

(10) - Figures include (i) households comprising a married couple without any other related persons; (ii) households comprising a couple and their unmarried child(ren) without any other related persons; and (iii) households comprising a father or mother and his/ her unmarried child(ren) without any other related persons. These households may or may not include other unrelated persons (e.g. domestic helpers).

(11) - Figures include (i) households comprising a couple and at least one of their parents (including the parent(s) of the wife and/ or husband) without any other related persons; (ii) households comprising a couple, at least one of their parents (including the parent(s) of the wife and/ or husband) and their unmarried children without any other related persons; and (iii) households comprising a group of related persons but not being classified in the other categories. These households may or may not include other unrelated persons (e.g. domestic helpers).
(12) - Figures include households with only one person and households comprising unrelated person(s).
(13) - Economically active household refers to a domestic household with at least one member (excluding foreign domestic helpers) being economically active.
(14) - Figures exclude domestic households living in unsheltered accommodation or on board vessels. Floor area of common area shared among households is excluded.
政府統計處　2021年人口普查
2021 Population Census, Census and Statistics Department
